A place where we build together

Move beyond benchmark scores and uncover
the qualitative signals that shape user preference.

Join us

About Us

Empowering students to build, innovate, and lead through technology.

More Than Just a Club —
We're a Movement.

The Developer Students Club is the premier technical community at SRM IST Ramapuram. We bring together aspiring developers, designers, researchers, and leaders under one roof to learn, build, and grow together.

From hands-on workshops and intense hackathons to open-source contributions and industry collaborations, DSC provides the platform for students to transform from learners into creators.

Our mission is simple: bridge the gap between classroom learning and real-world development, one project at a time.

0 Active Members
0 Workshops Hosted
0 Hackathons
0 Projects Built

Fostering developer
innovation

Developer Students Club, SRM IST Ramapuram provides
a collaborative space for students to learn, build, and grow
together, bridging the gap between theory and practice.

Hands-on learning &
workshops

Master modern frameworks, tools, and
platforms through peer-led study groups and
interactive tech workshops.

Real-world project
development

Apply theoretical concepts to solve real
local problems, collaborate in teams, and
build impactful open-source projects.

Global network &
mentorship

Connect with developers worldwide, learn
from industry experts, and prepare for a
career in the tech industry.

Domains

Specialized tracks designed to help you master the technologies that matter.

💻

Web & App Development

Build production-ready applications using modern frameworks and industry-standard practices. From responsive websites to cross-platform mobile apps.

React Node.js Flutter Next.js
🧠

Research & AI/ML

Dive deep into artificial intelligence, machine learning, and cutting-edge research. Publish papers, build models, and push the boundaries of what's possible.

TensorFlow PyTorch NLP Computer Vision
🎨

Design / UI-UX

Craft beautiful, intuitive user experiences. Learn design thinking, prototyping, and user research to create products that people love to use.

Figma Adobe XD Prototyping Design Systems
📊

Corporate / Operations & Management

The backbone of every great tech community. Manage events, build partnerships, handle marketing, and drive the operational excellence of DSC.

Event Ops Marketing Sponsorship Strategy

Gallery
